startup_profile.name: MedLink
startup_profile.objective: Launch an MVP for an online doctor appointment booking platform
startup_profile.problem_statement: Patients need a simple way to find doctors, book appointments, and receive reminders.
startup_profile.target_users: Patients in urban areas and small private clinics
startup_profile.mvp_scope_paragraph: The MVP includes signup/login, doctor search, appointment booking, clinic dashboard, and reminder notifications.
startup_profile.execution_context: Small startup team building an MVP in 10 weeks with limited budget and aiming for pilot clinics.
